title: Governance complexity metrics
outOfScope: Making observational metrics hard blocking without calibration evidence

sources.reason: Add structural governance metrics to the report.

riskAssessment.reason: New metrics must remain observational until thresholds are calibrated by evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Structural metrics are read-only observations with regression coverage.

preReviewWarnings: Review metric definitions and ensure thresholds remain calibrated separately.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The report includes Python, Markdown, governance-script, and guard-file counts.
Structural metrics are emitted without converting uncalibrated observations into blocking limits.
Regression tests verify the new metrics.
All Work Item and project checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Total line ceilings alone do not show where governance complexity is concentrated.
intent.rationale: Expose structural counts for review and future calibration without silently adding new blockers.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
